name: Bolos De Figo (Fig and Almond Candy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to a moderate temperature.
2. Heat the almonds in the oven until they are lightly browned and crispy.
3. Peel the almonds once cooled.
4. In a food processor or blender, mince the orange zest, figs, chopped chocolate, and almonds together.
5. Boil water and sugar in a saucepan until it reaches a thick, syrupy consistency.
6. Add the processed ingredients to the boiling mixture and stir until combined.
7. Allow the mixture to cool on a plate.
8. Shape the cooled mixture into small balls and roll them in sugar.
9. Serve with coffee.
From The Cookie Lady's Files. Posted on GEnie's Food & Wine RT by COOKIE-LADY [Cookie] on 9/18/93, MM by QBTOMM and Sue Woodward (S.WOODWARD/GEnie; 72772,2247/CIS; SWOODWARD/NVN).
